description: The US Treasury did not issue an extension on Wednesday for its sanctions waiver covering Russian seaborne oil, which expired at midnight. However, neither President Donald Trump nor senior administration officials clarified whether the lapse would result in the sanctions being reinstated.

title: ICAI CA Final Results 2026: Noor Singla tops exam, result available at icai.org, icaiexam.icai.org
CA final result released: Direct link to download scorecards here
description: The Institute of Chartered Accountants of India has released the CA Final May 2026 examination results. Candidates can now check their scorecards online. The results are available on the official ICAI websites. Students need their registration and roll numbers to access their marks. The scorecard details subject-wise marks and the qualifying status.

title: After cutting controversial Janhvi scenes, Rs 400 cr Peddi adds 6-minutes footage
Pakistan's Fatima Sana scripts history, becomes first captain to achieve big WC feat
description: Fatima Sana etched her name in Women's T20 World Cup history with a remarkable all-round performance, scoring an unbeaten 55 and taking 3 wickets. Despite her heroic efforts, Pakistan narrowly lost to South Africa by two wickets in a thrilling contest. Sana's historic feat, however, couldn't secure a victory for her team.

title: Wages for housewives? We need more than that
AAP torn between politics, faith as Akal Takht summons all party MLAs
Sena (UBT) split buzz: 5 of 6 Uddhav MPs 'moved out of Delhi' ahead of party parliamentary meeting
description: Shiv Sena (UBT) MP Sanjay Raut issued a whip for a mandatory parliamentary meeting, prompting the Eknath Shinde-led Shiv Sena to reportedly move five of its six defecting MPs out of Delhi. Raut warned of action against absentees, asserting the party's readiness to face consequences and vowing to retaliate against attempts to split the party.

FIFA WC: Jude Bellingham scripts history, becomes youngest European to ...
description: Jude Bellingham became the youngest European player to feature in four major tournaments, achieving this milestone at 22 years and 353 days. He marked the occasion with a goal in England's 4-2 World Cup opener against Croatia. Bellingham's early career and commitment to the national team were highlighted, with his 50th cap potentially coming against Ghana.

title: What is the legacy badge? Why Messi and Ronaldo are wearing it at FIFA World Cup
description: Lionel Messi and Cristiano Ronaldo are among the first to wear the new FIFA World Cup Legacy badge at the 2026 tournament. This special sleeve patch honors players with exceptional longevity and achievements, recognizing their enduring impact on World Cup history. The badge celebrates their record-equalling sixth appearances and significant contributions to the sport.

description: Cristiano Ronaldo faced criticism after Portugal's draw against DR Congo, with Thierry Henry highlighting his movement as detrimental. Henry argued Ronaldo's desire to score obstructed teammates like Bruno Fernandes, hindering team opportunities. Despite a stellar international career, Ronaldo's performance lacked impact, with minimal shots and no chances created in the match.

title: $300 billion, sanctions relief, Hormuz reopening: What Iran gets, what US gains from deal
New deal at an old venue: From world wars to US-Iran peace, why Versailles matters
description: In a historic move at France's Palace of Versailles, US President Trump and Iranian President Pezeshkian signed a 14-point MoU to end hostilities. The agreement includes a military ceasefire, nuclear non-development pledge, sanctions relief, and frozen asset release. This landmark deal, aiming for a broader peace, echoes Versailles' legacy of significant international accords.

description: A 26-year-old newlywed woman in Ambernath died by suicide, with her family accusing her doctor husband and in-laws of dowry harassment and physical abuse. The deceased's family alleges constant surveillance via CCTV cameras and demands for more gifts. The husband, mother-in-law, and brother-in-law have been arrested following a police complaint.

Harry Kane and Kate Goodland turned a childhood romance Into marriage
description: Harry Kane enters his third World Cup as England's captain and all-time top scorer, fresh off a 36-goal Bundesliga season with Bayern Munich. Away from the pitch, his wife Katie Goodland has been part of his story since childhood. The pair met at age four in Chingford, started dating as teenagers in 2011, and married in 2019. A qualified fitness coach with a Sports Science degree, Goodland now balances her own career with raising their four children while supporting Kane through England's latest push to end six decades of World Cup hurt.

title: 2 flagship programmes commence at IIMA
More trouble for former Bengal minister Aroop Biswas as Messi team blames him for chaos
'Forced me to drink urine, gave electric shocks': Pune woman alleges 15 years of abuse by 'guru'
description: Pune police arrested a self-styled guru and seven associates for allegedly sexually exploiting and cheating a woman. The guru, Radhamohan Mishra, reportedly subjected the victim to severe abuse for 15 years, including physical and sexual assault, and forced her to transfer property. Investigations revealed plans for an escape tunnel and recovered incriminating electronic devices and valuables.

title: German passenger kicks cabin crew on Frankfurt-Hyderabad flight after trolley hits his leg
description: A German flight crew member on board a Lufthansa plane flying from Frankfurt to Hyderabad has lodged a criminal complaint against a fellow traveler. The situation escalated when the passenger, after having his leg accidentally brushed by a trolley, became confrontational and responded with an obscene gesture.

title: New claim about Jorge Messi’s health reframes Lionel Messi’s World Cup Tears
description: Lionel Messi revealed that his emotional reaction after Argentina’s World Cup win was unrelated to football. According to comments made by journalist Eduardo Feinmann on Radio Mitre, concerns about the health of Messi’s father, Jorge Messi, may have been behind the tears. Despite the personal situation, Messi starred in Argentina’s 3-0 victory over Algeria.

title: Sand mining feud: BJP neta burnt alive in car, 2 more killed in midnight ambush in Chhatisgarh
description: A violent sand mining turf war in Chhattisgarh's Koriya district resulted in a triple murder.  A BJP functionary was burnt alive in a luxury SUV, with two others dying from injuries after a suspected planned ambush. Police are investigating the escalating tensions between rival groups involved in the sand business.

title: Crissy Froyd claims Mike Silver liked old bikini photos after Russini Story Row
description: Crissy Froyd has accused The Athletic's Mike Silver of liking old bikini photos on her Instagram immediately after she published a column about the Mike Vrabel-Dianna Russini scandal, alleging the behaviour was targeted. Froyd, who was previously fired from USA Today Sports over her criticism of Russini, has alleged that at least six female reporters admitted to her that they traded intimacy for NFL access. Meanwhile, Russini has resigned from The Athletic, which is now conducting an internal investigation.

title: Dell CEO Michael Dell makes one of largest public university donations in US history
description: Michael Dell has gifted a staggering $750 million to the University of Texas at Austin, propelling the creation of a groundbreaking AI-native hospital and research campus. This substantial donation, adding to his family's legacy of support, will also bolster scholarships, advanced computing, and vital medical research, underscoring Dell's enduring connection to his alma mater.
